The PaymentGateway class has two methods:
1. `ChargeAsync(string cardToken, decimal amount)` - returns `ChargeResult(string ChargeId, bool Success)`
2. `RefundAsync(string chargeId)` - returns `RefundResult(string RefundId, bool Success)`

The user mentioned webhook processing too, but I don't see that in the code. I'll write tests for what exists. Since the methods currently throw `NotImplementedException`, the tests will document the expected behavior and serve as a specification. Let me create comprehensive MSTest tests.
